title: Thelypteris mengeniana

The family Thelypteridaceae is a part of the order Polypodiales, and it is further classified under the class Polypodiopsida. intro: Thelypteris mengeniana, also known as Mengen's maiden fern, is a species of plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Indonesia, for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The plant's bioactive constituents include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
